payload.text: (usually followed by `to') having the necessary means or skill or know-how or authority to do something
(usually followed by `to') not having the necessary means or skill or know-how
facing away from the axis of an organ or organism
nearest to or facing toward the axis of an organ or organism
facing or on the side toward the apex
she was able to program her computer
we were at last able to buy a car
able to get a grant for the project
unable to get to town without a car
